acceptance_criteria: GET /media/{path} returns correct file with Content-Type; Cache-Control: public, max-age=31536000, immutable header present; 404 for non-existent files; path traversal attempts (/../) are rejected with 400; ETag header present for conditional GET
description: Implement the media serving endpoint. Files are stored on disk under media_dir. Serve with Cache-Control: public, max-age=31536000, immutable. Correct Content-Type from file extension or stored MIME type. ETag based on file modification time. This endpoint is designed to be fronted by the reverse proxy for production serving, but must work standalone for development.
design: Validate path: no .. components, no absolute paths, only alphanumeric + underscores + hyphens + dots + slashes. Serve from media_dir + path. Use tower-http ServeDir or custom handler. Caddy will typically serve these directly in production.
title: GET /media/:path — media file serving with cache headers
